overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game. A male character in a trench coat walks through a foggy, cobblestone street in a historic European city at night, illuminated by warm street lamps, and opens a wrought iron gate to enter a courtyard area beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy historic cobblestone street with iron fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward a closed iron gate in the distance

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface reflecting the warm glow of street lamps
tall stone building with arched doorway and weathered facade
dark colored delivery van parked on the right side of the street
black iron fence running along the right sidewalk
ornate cast iron street lamp emitting warm orange light
bare deciduous tree with scattered autumn leaves on the ground around it
tall black iron gate blocking the path ahead with stone pillars on each side
metal barrel with fire inside providing flickering warm light near the gate

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy, cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings and iron fencing. A parked van sits on the right side near the start, while vintage street lamps cast warm light through the mist. Ahead, a wrought iron gate blocks the path, with a burning barrel visible to the left.

events.description: character reaches the gate and interacts with the mechanism to open it
gate opens fully and character walks through to the courtyard beyond

agents.ego_description: opening the wrought iron gate and walking through the entrance to the other side

entered.detail: open cobblestone area visible beyond the gate with distant warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the wrought iron gate and interacts with it, causing the doors to swing open. Passing through the stone pillars, the character enters a courtyard area beyond. The historic building, tree, and parked van from the previous street section are now left behind as the scene transitions to the enclosed space beyond the gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, lamp-lit street into the secluded confines of a hidden courtyard. It begins by trailing a character in a trench coat along a cobblestone road lined with historic stone buildings and iron fencing, passing a parked van and a burning barrel under the warm glow of vintage street lamps. As the character reaches a wrought iron gate, the camera maintains its forward momentum while the doors swing open to reveal the path ahead. The scene then shifts from the open street to an enclosed space, passing through stone pillars and leaving the mist-shrouded road and its surrounding structures behind. Finally, the camera settles into the courtyard area, completing the transition from the public thoroughfare to the private interior.
